evals.name: pipeline-review-and-verify
evals.prompt: Create a workflow that reviews branch changes across bugs/security/tests and adversarially verifies each finding.
evals.expected_output: A runnable workflow with valid meta block, pipeline topology, structured schemas for findings/verdicts, and safe null handling.
assertions: Output contains an export const meta block as first statement
Workflow uses pipeline for multi-stage per-item flow
Each stage using structured data defines JSON schema
Code safely handles null or missing stage outputs
Final return includes confirmed findings summary

evals.name: loop-with-budget-guard
evals.prompt: Create a loop workflow that keeps discovering issues until budget is low, with a hard cap to ensure termination.
evals.expected_output: A loop workflow with both budget guard and hard cap, plus progress logging and structured outputs.
assertions: Loop includes a hard cap termination condition
Structured schema is used for collected items

evals.name: portable-generalization-guidance
evals.prompt: Explain how to adapt this workflow for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, and Gemini with a shared portable spec.
evals.expected_output: A clear architecture split (intent/adapters/runner), model mapping strategy, and deterministic artifact-based state transfer guidance.
assertions: Response defines a portable canonical spec
Response includes per-platform adapter notes for all four runtimes
Response includes determinism and resume/replay guidance
